form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 4th (Fr4) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track was 3rd-10.24 at the bell, beaten 13 m by You Are My Wish (2:05.00) in 3yo NR up to 50 on April 8 at $41. form.formComment: Four-year-old mare (Mcwicked - Our Lansdowne Road) making her debut. Finished third in a trial on April 7 at Bathurst over 1730m. A bit of a push for her in early discussions is worth noting.

form.formComment: Finding that maiden win elusive. Last start 5th (Fr2) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track was 2nd-3.82 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Ultimate Wahini (2:06.90) in MAIDEN on April 8 at $8.50. The run before was well back in the run when 5th (Fr4) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 6th-10.45 beaten 16 m by Studleigh Fury (2:05.80) in MAIDEN on April 1 at $51. Can turn things around in this suitable contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced during the middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second behind Studleigh Fury at this track over 1730m in a MAIDEN on April 1 at $71.
